name: The Shield
description:
⎯ ୨Being The Shield ୧ ⎯

Sierra. Hotel. India. Echo. Lima. Delta. The Shield.

A group created in order to protect against injustice. Dean Ambrose: the wildcard scrapper. Roman Reigns: the quiet enforcer. Seth Rollins: the technical architect.

And you: their manager.

Good luck (you're probably going to need it)

꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦

🍫Tested using DeepSeek V3 0324

🍫Not requested, but wanted to get some practice in for writing a multi-bot since I have a few in my requested list. So decided why not create one I’ve wanted to for a bit now

🍫So, uh, no surprise: it’s them. I’m a SHIELD girlie. We know this. 

🍫This takes place pre-them breaking up, but I may make a part 2 but may make a part 2 where you come back to manage them for the angst 

꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦

Don't know what to do? Here's some simple roleplay suggestions to spice things up:

🍫 Be a childhood friend of Dean, Roman, or Seth and you were recruited by that member to be the manager

🍫 Get romantically involved with one….or all?…of them 

🍫 You recently became the manager and are trying to navigate the chaotic landscape of these three idiots 

꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦꒷꒦

🍫 Any critiques or suggestions are gratefully appreciated!

April 6th, 2026 update: Overhauled personality section using my current template, added an open scenario, updated bio to my current template
creator: MintEverest
